scripts.wp-env:start:multisite: cross-env WP_ENV_MULTISITE=1 WP_ENV_PORT=8890 WP_ENV_TESTS_PORT=8891 wp-env start
scripts.wp-env:stop:multisite: cross-env WP_ENV_MULTISITE=1 WP_ENV_PORT=8890 WP_ENV_TESTS_PORT=8891 wp-env stop
scripts.wp-env:destroy:multisite: cross-env WP_ENV_MULTISITE=1 WP_ENV_PORT=8890 WP_ENV_TESTS_PORT=8891 wp-env destroy
scripts.wp-env:setup:multisite: cross-env WP_ENV_MULTISITE=1 WP_ENV_PORT=8890 WP_ENV_TESTS_PORT=8891 wp-env run cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/tests/fixtures/wp-env/bin/setup.php
scripts.wp-env:logs:multisite: cross-env WP_ENV_MULTISITE=1 WP_ENV_PORT=8890 WP_ENV_TESTS_PORT=8891 wp-env logs --no-watch
scripts.wp-env:logs:tests:multisite: cross-env WP_ENV_MULTISITE=1 WP_ENV_PORT=8890 WP_ENV_TESTS_PORT=8891 wp-env logs tests --no-watch
scripts.test:integration:multisite:run: cross-env WP_ENV_MULTISITE=1 WP_ENV_PORT=8890 WP_ENV_TESTS_PORT=8891 wp-env run tests-cli php wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/phpunit.integration.xml.dist
scripts.test:integration: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run test:integration:run
scripts.test:integration:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run test:integration:multisite:run
scripts.test:e2e: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run test:e2e:multisite:run
scripts.test:wp: npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:wp:multisite: npm run test:integration:multisite && npm run test:e2e:multisite
